changelog: CRASH FIX (Lite Mode) — v1.44.19 crashed on first frame of the Lite Home screen on every device because the LazyRow keys were the entire MediaCard data class. Compose's SaveableStateHolder tries to bundle the key for state restoration; data classes aren't Bundle-storable → IllegalArgumentException, instant crash.
Switched to MediaCard.id (a String) as the LazyList key. Bundle-safe, fixes the crash, and gives stable scroll position when the list reshuffles.

Caught from the on-device crash report uploaded to /crash/submit (skyworth Android Google TV, 1.44.19-debug). The crash-reporting infrastructure paid for itself again — root cause was identifiable in seconds from the Compose stack trace.
